# @gears-frontx/react

> React bindings, hooks, and components for FrontX SDK. Provides type-safe integration with React applications including MFE (Microfrontend) support.

Part of the FrontX React Layer (L3) - depends on @gears-frontx/framework. Peer dependency on react and react-dom.

## Core API

- [Gears FrontXProvider](https://frontx.dev/docs/react/provider): Root context provider
- [MFE Components](https://frontx.dev/docs/react/mfe): ExtensionDomainSlot, MfeProvider, RefContainerProvider
- `Gears FrontXProvider` resolves the shared `QueryClient` from `queryCache()` / `queryCacheShared()` through the app instance; mounted MFEs reuse the host cache by building their local app with `queryCacheShared()`, which joins the same shared `QueryClient` without mutating L1 contracts

## Hooks

| Hook | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `useFrontX()` | Access app instance |
| `useAppDispatch()` | Type-safe dispatch |
| `useAppSelector()` | Type-safe selector |
| `useTranslation()` | Translation utilities (t, language, setLanguage, isRTL) |
| `useScreenTranslations()` | Lazy load screen translations |
| `useTheme()` | Theme utilities (currentTheme, themes, setTheme) |

## MFE Hooks

| Hook | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `useMfeBridge()` | Access MFE bridge (child MFEs) |
| `useSharedProperty()` | Subscribe to shared property changes |
| `useHostAction()` | Invoke actions on host application |
| `useDomainExtensions()` | Subscribe to extensions in a domain |

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { Gears FrontXProvider, useTranslation, useFrontX } from '@gears-frontx/react';

// Wrap app with provider
function App() {
  return (
    <Gears FrontXProvider>
      <Layout>
        <MainScreen />
      </Layout>
    </Gears FrontXProvider>
  );
}

// Use hooks in components
function MyComponent() {
  const { t, isRTL } = useTranslation();
  const app = useFrontX();

  return (
    <div dir={isRTL ? 'rtl' : 'ltr'}>
      <h1>{t('common:title')}</h1>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## MFE Patterns

### Using ExtensionDomainSlot

```tsx
import { ExtensionDomainSlot } from '@gears-frontx/react';

function LayoutScreen() {
  return (
    <ExtensionDomainSlot
      registry={registry}
      domainId="screen"
      extensionId="home"
      loadingComponent={<Loading />}
    />
  );
}
```

### Using MFE Bridge

```tsx
import { useMfeBridge, useSharedProperty, Gears FrontX_ACTION_LOAD_EXT, Gears FrontX_SHARED_PROPERTY_THEME } from '@gears-frontx/react';

function MyExtension() {
  const bridge = useMfeBridge();
  const theme = useSharedProperty(Gears FrontX_SHARED_PROPERTY_THEME);

  const handleAction = async () => {
    await bridge.executeActionsChain({
      action: { type: Gears FrontX_ACTION_LOAD_EXT, target: 'screen', payload: { extensionId: 'other' } }
    });
  };

  return <div style={{ backgroundColor: theme?.primaryColor }}>...</div>;
}
```

### Subscribing to Domain Extensions

```tsx
import { useDomainExtensions } from '@gears-frontx/react';

function ScreenList() {
  const screenExtensions = useDomainExtensions('screen');

  return (
    <ul>
      {screenExtensions.map((ext) => (
        <li key={ext.id}>{ext.title}</li>
      ))}
    </ul>
  );
}
```

## Optional

- [Screen Translations](https://frontx.dev/docs/react/translations): Per-screen lazy loading
- [Custom Hooks](https://frontx.dev/docs/react/hooks): Building on FrontX hooks
- [MFE Bridge Communication](https://frontx.dev/docs/react/mfe-bridge): Parent-child patterns
